message:
feat(harness): add env var controls for Bayesian diff, BOCPD, and conformal

Add environment variable support for runtime policy configuration:

New environment variables:
- FTUI_HARNESS_DIFF_BAYESIAN: Enable/disable Bayesian diff strategy
- FTUI_HARNESS_BOCPD: Enable/disable BOCPD resize detection
- FTUI_HARNESS_CONFORMAL: Enable/disable conformal prediction
- FTUI_HARNESS_EVIDENCE_JSONL: Path for evidence log output

Implementation:
- Add env_flag() helper for parsing boolean env vars (supports 1/true/
  TRUE/True/yes/YES/on/ON)
- Wire env vars to ProgramConfig at startup
- Import ConformalConfig and EvidenceSinkConfig from ftui_runtime

This enables policy toggle matrix testing without code changes, allowing
E2E scripts to systematically validate all combinations of Bayesian/
BOCPD/conformal settings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
